Create your workspace

Five minutes to a quieter reading habit.

No credit card until you choose a paid plan. You can leave with your data at any time.

  1. 1 Account
  3. 2 Reading profile
  5. 3 Pick a plan

Start with the basics.

You can change all of this later from Settings.

Back to site

How do you read now?

Two quick answers. Lumio uses these to tune summaries and the spaced recall tempo.

What do you read most?
How many hours per week can you read, honestly?
Your main reason for trying Lumio?

Pick a plan, change it any time.

Deep Reader comes with a 14 day trial, no card needed until you finish onboarding.

Where Lumio sends email

  • Weekly reading letter on Sunday
  • Never more than one email a week
  • Opt out in one click, no dark patterns
  • Zero marketing emails by default

Your workspace is ready.

We mailed you a verification link. It usually lands in under a minute. While you wait, here is what happens next.

  • 1Install the Lumio browser extension, it's how saves work in one tap.
  • 2Forward any newsletter to save@lumio.app to try the auto summary.
  • 3Tomorrow morning, your first two recall cards will be waiting.
Back to the site

This page is a bounded demo artifact. It does not transmit the form. NERIUM Builder replayed this signup from cache.

What your week looks like with Lumio

Monday morning Two recall cards, 4 min
Wednesday evening Three articles summarized
Saturday afternoon One long read, deep focus mode
Sunday, 08:00 Weekly letter in your inbox

What one reader said

"I signed up on a whim and the second weekly letter made me cry, in a small good way. It handed me back a thought I had in May."

Lumio is calm by design.

  • ● No streak guilt, skipping days is fine.
  • ● No gamification that pretends to be growth.
  • ● Quiet recall, not loud notifications.
  • ● Your data exports on day one, not day ninety.

Bounded demo build, shipped by NERIUM Builder. No actual account created.
